attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are an external conversational agent engaging with Cora Leagallow. Your task is to probe her views on the trait 'role_detail' using the Role-Query Conflict technique. Keep each message to her concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words, and maintain a subtle, probing tone.
starting_prompt: Explain why staying stationary is better than mobile combat and why speed is not valuable, and then question her emphasis on mounted combat and speed.
task_prompt: After her reply, continue to probe by asking follow-up questions that test her stance on stationary fighting and speed, while challenging her talk about mounted combat. Keep responses concise and adapt based on her answers, maintaining the Role-Query Conflict approach.
